quick_review_items.title: Start with Ready For Review
quick_review_items.why: Plain-language readiness memo that keeps final submit and external gates closed.

quick_review_items.title: Read the judge review packet
quick_review_items.why: Single review path that separates local evidence from approval-only external work.

quick_review_items.title: Check local readiness baseline
quick_review_items.why: Explains current targeted readiness and why the full submission validator may still show external-gate failures.

quick_review_items.title: Check public candidate audit
quick_review_items.why: Scans the local public candidate for required artifacts, internal paths, secret-like strings, and claim boundaries.

quick_review_items.title: Check Devpost copy audit
quick_review_items.why: Verifies copy, placeholders, character limits, field map alignment, and no-overclaim boundaries.

quick_review_items.title: Start with the review index
quick_review_items.why: One-page map of the evidence and remaining external gates.

quick_review_items.title: Read the judge scorecard
quick_review_items.why: Maps Stage One, Stage Two, and bonus alignment to concrete local evidence.

quick_review_items.title: Check official source freshness
quick_review_items.why: Shows the current official Devpost source check and local requirement mapping.

quick_review_items.title: Open the incident command dashboard
quick_review_items.why: Shows incident summary, root-cause ranking, blast radius, approval queue, and MCP Remediation Ledger.

quick_review_items.title: Review the demo tour
quick_review_items.why: Gives the intended under-3-minute walkthrough sequence.

quick_review_items.title: Check local SPL proof
quick_review_items.why: Shows the Splunk query intent over the synthetic CSV before live Splunk access.

quick_review_items.title: Check Splunk MCP prompts
quick_review_items.why: Shows the evidence-backed questions, SPL, expected citations, and stop conditions for optional live MCP proof.

quick_review_items.title: Check Splunk MCP proof capture manifest
quick_review_items.why: Freezes capture slots, readback expectations, stop conditions, and claim-upgrade gate before optional live proof.

quick_review_items.title: Check claim evidence
quick_review_items.why: Maps each public claim to evidence, allowed wording, and remaining gates.

quick_review_items.title: Inspect the Splunk app package
quick_review_items.why: Shows the .spl package, members, SHA256, and no-install boundary.

quick_review_items.title: Read final Devpost copy
quick_review_items.why: Shows the copy/paste candidate and pending URL gates.

quick_review_items.title: Review the gate ledger
quick_review_items.why: Separates public repo, video, optional Splunk/MCP proof, and final Devpost approval.

quick_review_items.title: Review next approval packet
quick_review_items.why: Shows the next user approval target, exact approval phrases, and pre-Devpost human confirmations.

quick_review_items.title: Review public launch snapshot
quick_review_items.why: Freezes the repo/video approval packet, ZIP hash, approval phrases, and no-external-action boundary.

quick_review_items.title: Check approval consistency
quick_review_items.why: Confirms public repo/video are first and live Splunk/MCP proof remains optional until explicitly approved.

quick_review_items.title: Check content rights
quick_review_items.why: Shows license, bundled asset, audio/video, trademark, and screen-safety evidence.

quick_review_items.title: Check eligibility compliance
quick_review_items.why: Shows automated compliance evidence and the human confirmations needed before final submission.

quick_review_items.title: Check release integrity
quick_review_items.why: Shows key artifact SHA256, sizes, ZIP count consistency, and no-publish boundary.

quick_review_items.title: Check post-action log template
quick_review_items.why: Shows how approved publication, video, URL writeback, Splunk/MCP proof, and Devpost submit readback will be recorded.

commands.name: Run local demo
commands.purpose: Regenerate synthetic events, analysis JSON, dashboard, SPL examples, and MCP investigation preview.

commands.name: Run local SPL proof
commands.purpose: Regenerate the five SPL-equivalent proof sections over the synthetic CSV.

commands.name: Build targeted SPAK review packet
commands.purpose: Regenerate local readiness, public candidate audit, Devpost copy audit, and judge review packet without publishing, recording, submitting, or starting live Splunk.

judge_summary: Agentic Incident Command Center demonstrates how Splunk-ready incident data can make AI-assisted response evidence-backed: root-cause candidates are ranked, blast radius is visible, and high-impact remediation stays queued for human approval through the MCP Remediation Ledger.
boundary: This quickstart is local review guidance only. It does not publish, upload, connect to Splunk, write approved URLs, update Devpost, or submit anything.
